GET /health
GET /api/patients
GET /api/patients/{patient_id}
GET /api/cases
GET /api/cases/{case_id}
GET /api/observations
GET /api/medications
GET /api/allergies
GET /api/problems
GET /api/imaging
GET /api/care-registry
GET /api/sdoh
GET /api/protocols
GET /api/protocols/{protocol_id}
POST /api/query
POST /api/judge
